before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"adrlc","text":"- Pre-reduce medium by boiling and cooling under anaerobic conditions (N2/CO2 atmosphere).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"n7pcq","text":"- Incubate at 37°C in anaerobic jars with gas packs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"pvgul","text":"- Bacto Soytone: 5000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pdal5","text":"- Casein peptone: 10000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gqxum","text":"- Glucose: 10000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qvnqz","text":"- Yeast extract: 5000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rsw95","text":"- L-Cysteine HCl x H2O: 500 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xogv6","text":"- Meat extract: 5000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"0psxg","text":"- MgSO4 x 7 H2O: 220 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5fh9v","text":"- NaCl: 5080 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bnv92","text":"- Resazurin: 4 ml (optional)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jit1y","text":"- Tween 80: 1 ml (optional)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rha6y","text":"- Water: 990 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pre-reduce medium by boiling and cooling under anaerobic conditions (N2/CO2 atmosphere). Incubate at 37°C in anaerobic jars with gas packs.
